name: Almond Tea Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the almonds and rice in a bowl with 2 pints (5 cups) cold water. Cover and let stand for 2 hours.
2. Strain through a fine muslin into a large bowl.
3. Add milk and mix well.
4. Place the bowl in a large saucepan with enough boiling water to come halfway up the sides of the bowl. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 2 hours.
5. Add sugar, stir well, and let cool slightly.
6. Mix the gelatin with 2 tablespoons (2 1/2 Tbsp) hot water until dissolved. Stir into the milk mixture when it is almost cold.
7. Mix well and pour into a shallow serving dish. Allow to set.
